picks.quote: Max Holloway is smart enough to do that on his feet... I do think he's got that momentum.
Saint Denis is so aggressive... he forces this pour-on a pressure and then once he gets you down, he's very good in the top position at sucking the energy out of you.
As long as he keeps it free-flowing movement... I think that he's got the best chance against Bautista.
Royval has a weird style in the sense of he can just get out of submissions so well... to me that's his best attribute is even losing... he still believes he can win.
Gable Steveson is the best in this division from my experience with his grappling to set that wrestling up.
